_source: Revenue Commissioners Ireland — Budget 2025 (announced Oct 2024, effective 1 Jan 2025)

incomeTax._note: Standard rate cut-off points raised in Budget 2025

usc._note: USC — Universal Social Charge. Exempt if total income ≤ €13,000

prsi._note: PRSI rate increased by 0.1% from 1 Oct 2024, so 4.1% applies for full 2025 tax year

taxCreditsCents._note: Tax credits reduce income tax payable. They do not reduce USC or PRSI.

cgt._note: Capital Gains Tax. Annual personal exemption is per individual, not per disposal.

vat._note: Irish VAT rates as of 2025. Code follows Revenue designation.

descriptions.A: Standard rate (23%) — most goods and services
descriptions.B: Reduced rate (13.5%) — fuel, building services, hospitality, tourism
descriptions.C: Second reduced rate (9%) — newspapers, e-publications, periodicals
descriptions.D: Zero rate (0%) — food, children's clothing, oral medicines, books, exports

stampDuty._note: Residential stamp duty rates 2025. Non-residential: 7.5%. Shares: 1%.
